LightningComponentBundle.description: Shared node processing service module. Provides applyFilters (filters a flat node list against the current filter state), buildTypeCounts (produces MetadataType-to-count map from a node list), buildNodeMap (produces an Id-to-node Map for O(1) lookup), extractTypes (returns sorted unique type list from nodes), maxDepth (returns the deepest Dependency_Depth__c value in a node list), resolveSetupUrl (maps a node to its "Open in Setup" deep-link URL), and isNamespacePrefixed (detects managed-package namespace prefixes for package.xml export exclusion). No Apex calls, no UI, no state. Used by metaMapperResults, metaMapperGraph, metaMapperTree, and metaMapperExport.
